nasb.text: But there were not made for the house of the Lord silver cups, snuffers, bowls, trumpets, any vessels of gold, or vessels of silver from the money which was brought into the house of the Lord;

esv.text: But there were not made for the house of the Lord  basins of silver, snuffers, bowls, trumpets, or any vessels of gold, or of silver, from the money that was brought into the house of the Lord,

cnv.text: 但耶和華殿裡的銀杯、燭剪、碗、號或任何金銀器皿，都沒有用奉到耶和華殿裡的銀子來做。

ccb.text: 献到耶和华殿里的银子没有用于制造殿里的银碗、蜡剪、盆、号及其他金银器皿，
